summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Automated Interview Reminder Scheduling. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). The scheduler is working correctly - starts automatically on server startup, runs first check 30 seconds after startup, then every 5 minutes.

features_tested.evidence: Log shows 'Email reminder scheduler started' on startup

features_tested.feature: First scheduler check runs 30 seconds after startup
features_tested.evidence: Log shows 'First check in: 30 seconds' and next_run_time is set to now + 30 seconds
scheduler_interval='5 minutes' in status endpoint, logs show interval[0:05:00]

features_tested.feature: Debug logs show server time, time windows, and eligible events
features_tested.evidence: Logs show 'Server Time (UTC)', '24hr Window', '1hr Window', and 'Eligible for 24hr/1hr reminder'

features_tested.feature: Events 23-25 hours away are eligible for 24hr reminder
features_tested.evidence: Test created event 24hr away, scheduler status shows eligible_24hr=true

features_tested.feature: Events 50-70 minutes away are eligible for 1hr reminder
features_tested.evidence: Test created event 1hr away, scheduler status shows eligible_1hr=true
Returns 200 with check_time, logs show 'Manual scheduler check triggered'
Tests pass for ISO with Z suffix, ISO with timezone offset, ISO without timezone

critical_code_review_comments: Scheduler implementation is correct and comprehensive
parse_event_datetime properly handles Z suffix, timezone offsets, and no-timezone formats
Time window calculations use proper datetime arithmetic (23-25 hours for 24hr, 0.833-1.167 hours for 1hr)
Debug logging provides excellent visibility into scheduler operations

test_credentials.note: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern test_*@example.com

seed_data_creation: Test calendar events created during testing (cleaned up after each test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automated Interview Reminder Scheduling is fully functional. The scheduler: 1) Starts automatically on server startup, 2) Runs first check 30 seconds after startup, 3) Runs every 5 minutes thereafter, 4) Correctly identifies events in 24hr window (23-25 hours) and 1hr window (50-70 minutes), 5) Has debug endpoints /api/scheduler/status and /api/scheduler/run-check for monitoring.

log_evidence.first_check_config: 2026-02-03 15:58:28,598 - server - INFO -   - First check in: 30 seconds
log_evidence.interval_config: 2026-02-03 15:58:28,598 - server - INFO -   - Check interval: every 5 minutes
